commodities.title: US LNG Exports Hit Record April High Despite Seasonal Dip
commodities.description: US LNG exporters are on track to ship record April volumes. By the end of the month, US export volumes are poised to reach 10.15 million tons (Mt), according to Kpler data.

commodities.title: Trident gold assays reveal ex-Cameco site’s promise in Saskatchewan
commodities.description: The Contact Lake gold mine produced about 190,000 oz. gold at an average grade of 6.16 grams from 1994 until 1998.

commodities.title: TotalEnergies Middle East Oil, Natural Gas Production Offline Indefinitely
commodities.description: TotalEnergies said about 15% of its oil and natural gas production in the Middle East remains offline and didn’t offer a timeline for restarting the output as conflict continues there with no end in sight.

commodities.title: Gold price extends decline ahead of Fed decision
commodities.description: Spot gold fell another 1.3% to approximately $4,510 an ounce, extending a 2% decline for the week.

commodities.title: Midmorning Market: Northeast Natural Gas Prices Power Up as Chills Endure, Production Flattens
commodities.description: Natural gas spot prices in the densely populated Northeast rallied toward midweek as a late-season bout of frigid air hovered and supply in the region remained relatively vulnerable to surges in demand.

commodities.title: Russia Says It Has No Plans to Leave OPEC+
commodities.description: Russia said it has no plans of leaving its alliance with OPEC after the United Arab Emirates' shock decision to quit the cartel raised questions about its future.

commodities.title: USDA and EXIM partner to strengthen export credit and financing
commodities.description: Pairing Export-Import Bank credit programs with GSM-102 guarantees will expand options and help boost sales of U.S. ag exports.

commodities.title: Eni Reaches Agreement with Venezuela to Restart 35Bbbl Field
commodities.description: Eni has entered into a deal with Venezuela's Hydrocarbons Ministry and state-owned PdVSA to relaunch activities at the Junin-5 heavy oil field in the Orinoco Belt.

commodities.title: Stalemate in USA-Iran Conflict Continues
commodities.description: The stalemate in the U.S.-Iran conflict has continued for a further week with no clear resolutions on either side, Standard Chartered Bank Head of Energy Research Emily Ashford said.

commodities.title: OMV Petrom Raises Annual Budget by 23 Percent

commodities.title: Mining deals hit $21.6B in strongest Q1 since 2023
